title: TS Procure 812 - primary fixation Karnovsky's - tissue (TM - 013)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"3f6v7","text":"The method is used to process conventionally EM fixed 1mm3 tissues to Procure 812 resin blocks. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"d1klo","text":"Sample is not optimal for EM, best to dissect and use only the outer 2mm of tissue mass. Sample is usually derived from histology.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: SAN: SPEC No: OPERATOR & STEPS: OPERATOR & STEPS:

Karnovsky's fixative: 2.5 % volume 25% Glutaraldehyde Contributed by users and 4 % volume 16% Paraformaldehyde ProSciTech Catalog #C004 in 0.1 Molarity (M) Sorenson's Phosphate buffer (pH 7.2, 300mosmol/kg) for at least 00:40:00 or overnight
1 % volume Osmium Tetroxide ProSciTech in buffer 01:00:00
70 % volume Ethanol Contributed by users for at least 00:20:00 or overnight
100 % volume Ethanol Contributed by users dried with molecular sieve 00:20:00
50 % volume Ethanol Contributed by users 50 % volume Propylene oxide ProSciTech Catalog #C156 (CAS: 75-56-9) 00:20:00
50 % volume Propylene oxide ProSciTech Catalog #C156 (CAS: 75-56-9) 50 % volume Procure 812
Embed & polymerise overnight in oven at 60 °C
creator: sandra.crameri
